text:
29 January , 2004, 16:30
Birth details
VVS Laxman was born in Hyderbad on November 1st 1974 at 2.45 am
Chart Analysis
Most sportsmen have a strongly placed 3rd and 6th lords. In Laxman’s charts there
are many planets in the 3rd house invariably making him a good sportsman.
From lagna (ascendant) the 10th lord of career is in the 3rd house forming a Raja
Yoga (luck for sports). From Chandra lagna, the 10th lord is in the 3rd house, and
from Karagamsa lagna the 10th lord is in the 2nd house.
Laxman and World Cup 2003
The 10th house of career has neecha ketu (debilitated ketu), giving rise to troubles and
obstruction in career. Also Saturn was transiting his neecha Ketu in the 10th house,
hence he was subjected to pain, anguish and humiliations as far as career is
concerned.
Laxman’s Debut in international cricket
He made his debut in 1996/97 against West Indies. It was the period of Saturn, which
is Raja Yoga Karaka and also 10th lord from Chandra and also Karkamsha lagna.
